summary: Backend-only testing of Customer Scenario (Part 3 of 3) completed successfully. 25/25 tests passed. FIXED: Critical datetime comparison bug in orders.py that caused 500 error during order creation.

fixed_during_testing.issue: 500 error when creating orders due to datetime comparison between timezone-aware and timezone-naive datetimes
fixed_during_testing.root_cause: Line 147 in orders.py compared 'now' (timezone-aware, UTC) with 'end_datetime' which could be timezone-naive when parsed from database
fixed_during_testing.fix_applied: Added timezone check and fallback to UTC when end_datetime.tzinfo is None

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed datetime comparison bug in orders.py - now handles both timezone-aware and timezone-naive datetimes
Customer registration with user_type=buyer correctly auto-approves the account
Address creation correctly persists latitude/longitude fields
Cart operations (add, update, clear) working correctly
Order creation, tracking, and retrieval all working correctly
Payment methods CRUD operations working correctly

test_customer_created.note: New customer created each test run with random phone

seed_data_creation: TEST_عميل اختباري جديد customer created with address, payment method, and order during test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 scenarios tested successfully: Seller (iteration_83), Driver (iteration_84), Customer (iteration_85). Critical bug fixed in orders.py - datetime comparison issue. Note: Driver home location bug from iteration_84 still exists (separate issue).

customer_registration.notes: New customer with user_type='buyer' gets is_approved=True automatically

duplicate_phone_registration.notes: Returns 400 with Arabic message when phone already registered

get_addresses.notes: Returns list of addresses with all fields

update_address.notes: All fields including location are updated

get_categories.notes: Returns list of categories with icons

get_cart_with_items.notes: Returns cart items with product details

create_order.notes: Fixed datetime comparison bug - order creation now works correctly

get_order_details.notes: Returns full order details with items

rca_of_the_issue.bug_title: Order creation fails with 500 error - datetime comparison error
reproduction_steps: 4. Backend throws TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In /app/backend/routes/orders.py line 147, the code compares 'now' (which is datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timezone-aware) with 'end_datetime' parsed from database which might be timezone-naive if the stored end_date doesn't have timezone info.
rca_of_the_issue.impact: Critical - All order creation was broken, customers couldn't place orders
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added check for end_datetime.tzinfo is None and fallback to UTC timezone if missing
